name: Salsa, Cantaloupe
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the olive oil, garlic, onion, lime juice, and salt.
2. Let stand for 20 minutes.
3. Peel and seed the cucumbers. Peel the orange and mango. Peel and core the apples. Seed the watermelon.
4. Cut all the fruit and cucumber into bite-size chunks. Peel and cut jicama into bite-size chunks. Dice the green pepper.
5. Place all of these in a large salad bowl. Toss with chili powder.
6. Add the olive oil/lime juice mixture and toss to combine thoroughly.
7. Serve chilled.
Serves 6 to 8.
